company_description:
Role: Junior .NET Developer
Long term assignment
Language: English
Work mode: 3 days onsite 2 days remote per week
Location: Brussel, VLG, Belgium
Primary Skills
.net, c#
Only EU Citizens
As a Junior .NET Developer, you will:
•Develop and maintain applications.
•Support integration with existing platforms.
•Assist in system enhancements and optimizations.
•Participate in testing, debugging, and validation activities.
•Engage in regular team and stakeholder coordination meetings.
Qualifications
What would make you a fit for the role:
•Bachelor’s or Master’s degree with at least 1 year of relevant experience.
•Solid foundational knowledge in software development.
•Strong willingness to learn and grow in a dynamic environment.
•Excellent collaboration and teamwork skills.
•Fluency in English, both spoken and written.

company_description:
Requirements
What do you need to succeed in this position?
Develop and maintain web-based interfaces for the eStation 3.0 and Climate Station, based on user community requirements.
Prepare installation and upgrade packages for applications, including database updates, and validate their functionality.
Create and update user documentation, including GUI descriptions and manuals.
Support preparation of training materials for web interfaces, including screenshots, diagrams, tutorials, and videos; provide user support and conduct training sessions as needed.
Maintain and update the dedicated eStation website, including content publication.
Oversee installation and maintenance of applications on development and production servers, including web clients.

company_description:
Web Developer (Freelance) - 12 Months - Brussels
Where Builders Build the Future
At RELYzIT Talent, we don’t recruit — we build. We unite the top 2% of builders — engineers, architects, creators — into a movement across Europe and the GCC. Vetted through our VECTOR7™ Signal Stack, you’re not just hired, you’re chosen. This is more than work. This is where builders build the future.
About the Role
Our client is driving a digital transformation for local governments, building a major information hub for Flanders through the "Local Decisions as Linked Open Data" (LBLOD) ecosystem. As a Web Developer, you’ll join a dynamic, mission-driven team developing semantic applications that empower governments to deliver smarter, more citizen-focused digital services. This is a freelance position for 12 months, based in Brussels, offering you the chance to shape the future of public sector technology.
Why This Role Matters
The digitalization of government services is accelerating, and the challenge is clear: how do we keep information about local products and services up-to-date, accessible, and meaningful for citizens and organizations? As a key builder in this ecosystem, you’ll help solve this challenge by developing and scaling semantic applications that enable seamless, efficient, and transparent digital service delivery. Your work will directly impact how local governments operate and interact with their communities, setting new standards for public sector innovation.
What You’ll Be Doing
Designing, developing, and deploying semantic web applications and microservices within a scaled agile (SAFE) environment
Building and maintaining components that leverage linked data technologies (SPARQL, RDF, RDFa, JSON-LD)
Developing user-centric frontends using EmberJS, ensuring applications are attractive, intuitive, and aligned with user needs
Utilizing Linux containers and Docker for scalable, reliable deployment
Collaborating with a multidisciplinary team to embed semantic approaches across new and existing products
Contributing to the evolution of the LBLOD ecosystem and related platforms
Engaging with the community and stakeholders to ensure solutions deliver real-world impact
Working in a thorough scrum team, following SAFE methodology for continuous delivery and improvement
What We’re Looking For
Demonstrable experience as a Software Developer (minimum 6 years)
Hands-on experience developing and deploying with Linux containers and Docker (minimum 1 year)
Proven skills in linked data technologies: SPARQL, RDF, RDFa, JSON-LD (minimum 1 year)
Experience with similar or relevant technologies (minimum 3 years)
Strong ownership mindset, with a drive to solve complex problems and deliver impact
Motivation to grow in semantic technology and contribute to intergovernmental, transversal projects
Experience working in agile/scrum teams, ideally with SAFE methodology
Demonstrable experience with EmberJS (preferred)
Experience with GitHub and mu.semte.ch (preferred)
Higher education (Bachelor or Master) in a technical/engineering field, or equivalent experience
Motivated to work in a public sector context, with a commitment to citizen-focused outcomes
Technical Skills
SPARQL, RDF, RDFa, JSON-LD
EmberJS
Linux containers, Docker
GitHub
mu.semte.ch
Agile/Scrum (SAFE methodology)
Language Proficiency
Dutch at European CEFR level C2 (mandatory)
Other Requirements
Freelance position, 12-month contract, 100% work regime
Remote work possible
Internships, academic, and hobby projects can be considered as relevant experience
Annual indexation provided, subject to prior consultation
Ready to build the future with us? Upload your CV and join the movement of elite builders shaping tomorrow’s digital government.
#RELYzIT #TechJobs #FreelanceTalent #Brussels #SemanticWeb #EmberJS #SPARQL #Docker #LinkedData #Agile #SAFE #Dutch

company_description:
Wij zijn op zoek naar een ervaren
React/React Native developer minstens 6 jaar ervaring
op de teller. Wil jij graag deel uitmaken van een digital agency met leuke en uitdagende projecten? Dan ben je bij ons aan het juiste adres.
Wat ga je doen?
Als React Native Developer werk je nauw samen met je collega's in het mobile app team, de UX-experts, designers, project managers en in veel gevallen ook met je collega engineers uit het web team. Je ontwikkelt en onderhoudt React Native apps op maat voor onze klanten en integreert ze met back-end systemen en web apps. Hierbij zorg jij voor de correcte opzet van de app, je kiest de juiste 3rd party componenten en SDK's, en zorgt uiteraard ook voor het hardcore development! Je coacht, helpt en ondersteunt jouw collega's en neemt mee de verantwoordelijkheid op in het technisch opleveren van het project.
Wie ben jij?
Je hebt minstens 6 jaar full-time ervaring in React & React Native ontwikkeling met ES6/ES2015.
Je hebt ervaring in lifecycle management en weet hoe je (JavaScript en native) 3rd party SDK’s kan implementeren.
Redux, Webpack, Jest en GIT zijn deel van je natuurlijke habitat.
Je kan configuraties aanpassen of build-dependencies instellen in Xcode en Android Studio.
Native kennis van iOS en/of Android is een grote plus.
Je volgt de React Native community van dichtbij, experimenteert met nieuwe componenten of libraries en komt met innovatieve ideeën die jouw project uniek maken
Waarom kiezen voor icapps?
Bij icapps geloven we in een cultuur van groei, samenwerking en plezier. Als React/React Native Developer kom je terecht in een dynamisch team met een open werksfeer.
Wat wij bieden:
✅ Hybride en flexibele werkmogelijkheden
✅ Elektrische wagen en laadkaart
✅ Een laptop, smartphone, abonnement & internet bij je thuis
✅ Maaltijd-, eco- en cadeaucheques
✅ Hospitalisatie- en groepsverzekering
✅ De leukste teamactiviteiten en afterworks

company_description:
About This Vacancy
We’re looking for a Front-End Developer who can turn complex requirements into clean, intuitive, and responsive interfaces. You’ll collaborate closely with back-end engineers and other stakeholders to deliver a unified, high-performing platform. - Develop responsive, high-quality user interfaces using modern JavaScript frameworks. - Work with cross-functional teams to integrate APIs, enterprise systems, and secure authentication flows. - Build and maintain reusable components and scalable front-end architecture. - Ensure strong accessibility, performance, and cross-browser consistency. - Contribute to CI/CD processes, testing practices, and cloud-based deployments.
What We Expect From You
2 years of experience in front-end or full-stack development with strong HTML, CSS (SASS/LESS), and JavaScript (ES6+) skills.
Hands-on experience with React and/or Vue.js, plus familiarity with TypeScript and component-based development.
Experience with REST APIs, async data handling, and tools like Next.js, Redux, or React Query.
Understanding of authentication standards (OAuth2, SSO, JWT) and integration with CMS/CRM or enterprise systems.
Knowledge of Git, agile workflows, testing practices, and cloud technologies such as Azure, Azure DevOps, or related tools like SQL, Blazor, Angular, Microsoft Graph API, or Azure storage services.
What You Can Expect From Us
TMC is an international high-tech consultancy company that brings expertise to its clients to support them in realizing their technological challenges. As such, TMC operates as an expert center at the disposal of its clients, helping them to be more competitive in an increasingly global and rapidly changing technological world. At TMC, we believe that people are the driving force behind technological innovation. That is why we strive to create the best possible conditions for tech talents to thrive. We offer you a challenging and stimulating work environment where you can be the director of your own career. As an Employeneur, you are part of our TMC family. Alongside our outstanding technical expertise, fun and engagement are meaningful parts of our culture.

company_description:
As a Junior ERP Software Developer, you’ll take on the role of
technical consultant
, meaning that you’ll be supporting our projects from start to finish, from analysis to implementation and support. Your focus will be on software development of SAP and Microsoft solutions, which will feel like coming home thanks to your deep knowledge of IT.
But there’s more: the
consultancy
element means that you’ll collaborate closely with our customers. You’ll learn to understand their needs and come up with customized technological solutions that work for their business.
Prepare yourself for an interesting journey, working on exciting projects for a broad range of companies and industries! This has multiple benefits, including a
steep learning curve
and the opportunity to work with
innovative technologies
.
What team will you be part of?
Our
SAP Development team
works on projects with technologies ranging from
RPA, Kyma, and AI
to more classic developments like
Java, NodeJS,
etc. In addition, we also specialize in S/4HANA full-stack developments with
ABAP
(a proprietary programming language),
UI5
(a JavaScript framework), and
RAP
for more classic implementations.
We work where we work best, when we work best. delaware has its offices in Antwerp, Ghent, Kortrijk, Liège, Lummen, and Wavre, but as a consultant, you’ll sometimes find yourself
on-site
with our customers as well. We offer flexible hours, and we’ll find the perfect balance together.
Prepare to launch your career like a rocket! At delaware, you’ll enjoy an attractive salary package and you’ll be part of one of the most exciting workplaces in Belgium and beyond. We’ll provide you with thorough training and onboarding and will invest in your growth every single day. If you’re motivated, the sky really is the limit.
Are we a match?
First of all, it’s important to know that we employ all kinds of people and profiles at delaware.
Don’t worry if you can’t meet all our requirements.
If you can meet some of them, then we want to hear from you and learn all about your skills, talents, and motivation.
So, if you . . .
Are a bachelor or masters
student
who’s in their final year or a
young professional
with one or two years of experience
Have the right skills in
object-oriented programming
and are willing to expand that knowledge with new technologies
Have an instinct for consultancy: you’re open to developing the necessary
communication skills
to connect with and guide business stakeholders and clients
Speak
English
in combination with
Dutch
Have a
driver’s license
, to get wherever you need to be
Are
motivated to learn
and eager to take on new challenges
. . . then you’re the Junior
ERP
Software Engineer we need!

company_description:
Job Title:
AngularJS Expert Developer
Location:
[Hybrid – Houten, Netherlands]
Job Type:
[Contract]
Experience Level:
[Mid-Level / Senior]
About the Role
We are seeking a highly skilled
AngularJS Developer
with extensive experience in building dynamic, high-performance web applications. The ideal candidate will have deep knowledge of
AngularJS (1.x)
and related front-end technologies, with a passion for creating seamless user experiences.
This role requires strong problem-solving skills, the ability to work in a fast-paced development environment, and a collaborative mindset to work with cross-functional teams.
Key Responsibilities
Develop and maintain web applications using AngularJS (1.x)
Collaborate with UX/UI designers to implement highly responsive front-end interfaces
Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability
Integrate with RESTful APIs and third-party services
Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
Participate in code reviews, testing, and debugging processes
Migrate legacy code to modern frameworks when necessary
Work with backend developers to define and consume APIs
Stay updated on best practices and emerging AngularJS trends
Required Skills and Qualifications
Proven experience as an AngularJS (1.x) developer (3+ years preferred)
Strong proficiency in JavaScript, HTML5, and CSS3
Deep understanding of MVC/MVVM architecture
Experience with tools like Grunt, Gulp, or Webpack
Familiarity with Git version control
Experience with RESTful services and APIs
Knowledge of cross-browser compatibility issues and workarounds
Strong debugging and performance tuning skills
Ability to work independently and as part of a team
Preferred Qualifications
Experience with Angular (2+), React, or other front-end frameworks
Understanding of backend technologies (Node.js, Python, PHP, etc.)
Experience with testing tools like Jasmine, Karma, or Protractor
Knowledge of Agile/Scrum methodologies

[Contract]
Experience Level:
[Mid-Level / Senior]
About the Role
We are seeking a highly skilled
AngularJS Developer
with extensive experience in building dynamic, high-performance web applications. The ideal candidate will have deep knowledge of
AngularJS (1.x)
and related front-end technologies, with a passion for creating seamless user experiences.
This role requires strong problem-solving skills, the ability to work in a fast-paced development environment, and a collaborative mindset to work with cross-functional teams.
Key Responsibilities
Develop and maintain web applications using AngularJS (1.x)
Collaborate with UX/UI designers to implement highly responsive front-end interfaces
Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability
Integrate with RESTful APIs and third-party services
Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
Participate in code reviews, testing, and debugging processes
Migrate legacy code to modern frameworks when necessary
Work with backend developers to define and consume APIs
Stay updated on best practices and emerging AngularJS trends
Required Skills and Qualifications
Proven experience as an AngularJS (1.x) developer (3+ years preferred)
Strong proficiency in JavaScript, HTML5, and CSS3
Deep understanding of MVC/MVVM architecture
Experience with tools like Grunt, Gulp, or Webpack
Familiarity with Git version control
Experience with RESTful services and APIs
Knowledge of cross-browser compatibility issues and workarounds
Strong debugging and performance tuning skills
Ability to work independently and as part of a team
Preferred Qualifications
Experience with Angular (2+), React, or other front-end frameworks
Understanding of backend technologies (Node.js, Python, PHP, etc.)
Experience with testing tools like Jasmine, Karma, or Protractor
Knowledge of Agile/Scrum methodologies

company_description:
Build the digital experiences that bring sustainable living to life 🌱
At Quatt, everything we do is about impact: we’re accelerating the energy transition with smart climate solutions for the home. Our goal? Help 3 million households switch to clean energy by 2030.
To make that happen, our digital experience needs to be just as innovative and intuitive as our technology. That’s where you come in.
As our Front-End Developer (Low Code), you build and maintain the web pages and low-code (Webflow) systems that power our online journey, from first click to sign-up. You transform design ideas into seamless, responsive experiences that look great, perform quickly, and scale effortlessly as we grow.
If you love clean design, efficient code, and a clear purpose behind your work, this might be the role for you!
Your impact
Build, optimize, and maintain Webflow pages that connect users to our mission.
Create responsive, high-performing designs that work seamlessly across all devices.
Add functionality with HTML, CSS, and light JavaScript, ensuring pages are fast, intuitive, and reliable.
Collaborate with design, marketing, and data teams to translate business goals into smart web experiences.
Configure and customize HubSpot forms and flows to support campaigns and lead generation.
Test, monitor, and continuously improve site performance, from speed to accessibility to SEO.
Document your work so we can keep scaling without losing quality.
What You Bring
3+ years of experience in front-end development.
Solid skills in HTML and CSS, and at least a basic understanding of JavaScript.
You collaborate easily across different departments.
You're familiar with Figma and can effectively transform designs into smooth, responsive webpages. You have an eye for design and structure; you care about details, layout, and how things feel.
Experience with Webflow or other low-code web building is a strong plus.
Experience with HubSpot or similar tools is a plus.
Fluent in English.
Able to work from our Amsterdam office (this is a hybrid role).
Why you’ll love working at Quatt
💚
See your impact: your work helps thousands of households move toward sustainable energy.
Grow quickly in a scale-up with a clear mission and ambitious goals.
Salary: €4000 – €5700 (based on experience) + 8% holiday allowance.
A full-time hybrid role; split your time between home and our vibrant Amsterdam office (32 hours is also possible).
25 vacation days + the option to work remotely for one month per year!
A pension plan.
Travel allowance, whether you travel by car or public transport.
Free daily office lunch, with plenty of veggie and vegan options.
Discounts on Quatt products, monthly team drinks, and seasonal events.
A diverse team of 30+ nationalities who love what they do and enjoy building something meaningful together.
A €2,000 referral bonus; help grow our team, and share the success!
About Quatt 🔋
We make the energy transition at home both simple and affordable.
Our portfolio includes smart heat pumps, home batteries, and supporting software. We manage the full chain ourselves, from sales to installation. That means we can act fast, improve continuously, and deliver consistent quality.
From 25 colleagues to nearly 300 in just a few years, our growth reflects our drive and ambition. At Quatt, you’ll find a culture of ownership, collaboration, and curiosity, where ideas quickly turn into action and every role contributes to our mission.
Questions?
Reach out to daphne.sloof@quatt.io, we’re happy to help!
Ready to join us?
Apply now! Even if you don’t tick every box. We care more about your mindset and drive than a perfect checklist.

company_description:
Who we are
At Software Improvement Group (SIG), we empower organizations to enhance their software quality through deep source code analysis and tailored, strategic advice. Our software assurance platform, Sigrid, together with our expert IT consultants, enables our customers to take full control of their software environments, ensuring their technology is a driver of success, not a source of risk. We have a strong market presence and serious growth ambitions for the coming years, and we are looking for people who want to help us realize this.
Our Software Development Team is continuously improving and expanding our Software Intelligence Platform. This is no small task: we are adding new analysis capabilities; we are growing and developing our front ends to become more intuitive, integrated and feature-rich; we are regularly revisiting our backend and deployment to scale and handle more code, faster.
How we work
As you might expect, we hold quality in high regard: we measure the quality of our code. Our process and our operations, are more than you might be used to. We code, write tests, review, discuss and refactor if needed. We don’t just spit out features and move on to the next thing. We automate things wherever we can and throw out stuff we no longer need. In the long run, quality equals speed. Some data you may be interested in: we have a Java backend and, Angular/Typescript frontend. Our pipeline starts in Gitlab which produces docker containers deployed on Kubernetes.
Where you come in
We are looking to grow our team at a steady pace. What we do is pretty high-end, so we can’t and won’t hire people in bulk. You’ll quickly find yourself responsible for significant chunks of our landscape. Our consultants are heavy users of our software. They are close by, and you’ll be working with them to get things right. You'll be doing some proper engineering, ranging from finding and solving performance bottlenecks to exploring new tools and technologies. And, once you're on to something, you'll talk about it in one of our frequent knowledge sessions.
Activities
Produce releases of software components using continuous delivery practices — enhancement on our automated source code analysis software and other tools.
Contribute to all phases of the software development lifecycle.
Educate and train other team members through supervision, coaching and reviewing
What's in it for you?
You'll work on the software that runs our business, so what you do makes a difference. You'll work in a modern environment with modern technologies, and you'll work with great colleagues in a diverse team. Through our process and coding standards, you will become an even better coder than you are today. There are plenty of opportunities to educate yourself through online training, attending conferences and trying out new stuff during our regular Exploration Days. On a lighter note, we have weekly Friday get-togethers, table tennis and Fussball to provide some desirable distraction. In general, you have a lot of control over your schedule as long as you get the job done.
Requirements
BSc+ level diploma in technical field
2+ years of hands-on strong programming experience in front-end JavaScript, SASS/HTML (or comparable technologies) and 1+ year in Angular with TypeScript.
Excellent communication skills
An eye for UX
Strong affinity with software-intensive systems
Excellent command of the English language
Strong analytical skills and ability to draw relevant conclusions

company_description:
Are you completely ready to showcase your skills as a Fullstack Developer at a fast-growing, international scale-up? Within our driven development team, we offer you the chance to play a crucial role in achieving our ambitious goals. Will you be the driving force behind our data goldmine? Then come aboard quickly and be part of our winning team!
Who are we?
At Leadinfo, we dominate the B2B marketing world! Leadinfo is the number one in B2B lead generation. We believe not just in numbers and campaigns but in a mix of creativity, passion, and discovering new possibilities. We are a vibrant scale-up with our headquarters in Rotterdam. We have thousands of clients and collaborate with more than 2,500 marketing agencies and major players like LinkedIn, Google, and HubSpot. Our mission? To provide every business with top-quality leads! Our young team of 80 colleagues, including 10+ software developers and data engineers, has a strong winner’s mentality to achieve this goal. We operate from our offices in the Netherlands, Belgium, Italy, Denmark, and Germany.
What will you be doing?
As a Fullstack Developer at Leadinfo, you will have a challenging and responsible role where you will work on our product, more specifically our internal tools and applications. Our goal is to provide the best user experience, and we always strive to achieve this to the fullest. That's why we constantly push the technology and iterate on all features to deliver maximum results and nothing less than a wow effect.
Your responsibilities:
Development and maintenance of our tools and applications: As a Fullstack Developer at Leadinfo.com, you will work on the development and maintenance of web scraping tools and related applications used to collect and analyze data from various websites. This includes writing code to extract and process data from different sources and integrating it into the platform.
Expansion of applications to new countries: At Leadinfo, we are growing fast and want to conquer the world with our product. To achieve this, it’s essential to build applications for our international expansion.
Research and development of new technologies: You will be continuously researching and implementing new technologies and frameworks to improve the platform’s performance and further optimize the user experience.
Mentor junior engineers, follow DevOps practices and set up best practices: As an experienced developer we expect more than just building features and reviewing code. You should help us improve our standards, put in place best practices and a culture of ownership and DevOps mentality and mentor and coach our juniors.
Requirements:
To get started as a Fullstack Developer at Leadinfo.com, you will need more than 4 years of experience as a software developer and will work with various tools and technologies, including:
PHP 8+ and Slim framework (no experience specifically with PHP version 8 or Slim required)
Cloud computing with AWS
Front-end development with React
Experience with DevOps practices and being responsible for deployment
The Leadinfo winner’s mentality, with passion and enthusiasm to improve every day
Enjoys hybrid working, both at our Dutch office and from home
Perks at Leadinfo:
At Leadinfo, we value your efforts! What do you get in return?
26 vacation days + an extra day off on your birthday
Pension plan
€50 per month to spend as you like (e.g., sports, hotel stays, meal boxes, and much more)
A healthy work/life balance, hybrid working environment
MacBook
An international team
Lunch and snacks every day
Pool table, Xbox, and Mario Kart on the Switch
Lots of fun, Friday afternoon drinks, and parties!
We believe everyone can win! This is Leadinfo and we are founded on the belief that everyone can be successful and, ultimately, win. Therefore, we seek out what’s best for our customers and for our people.

company_description:
Key Responsibilities
Lead development of features for the online shopping experience on Joybuy landing pages.
Explore, learn, design, and implement modular and scalable software components, based on your understanding of common search engines, complemented by current industry trends.
Understand the business problem space, and communicate impact to technical decisions while providing high-level estimates, and breakdown of tasks for the solutions proposed.
Enable decision making to architecture, and technical challenges faced by the team and document and share best practices, maintain and enhance quality of code written.
Minimum Qualifications
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
5+ years of hands-on software development experience in SEO with solid understanding of SEO principles, both on-page and technical.
Experience with SEM campaign landing page development and A/B testing.
Proven experience designing, developing, and maintaining robust, scalable applications.
Advanced knowledge in one or more programming languages, Javascript/Typescript, HTML/CSS, React.js, Node.js.
Familiarity with Server-side technologies: Java, Kotlin with a solid understanding of API design in GraphQL/RESTful services.
Familiarity with cloud architecture and platforms like AWS.
Experience with CI/CD pipelines and tools like Jenkins, Spinnaker, or GitHub Actions.
Excellent communication skills in English.
Preferred Qualifications
eCommerce or retail industry experience.
2+ years of experience designing, analyzing, and troubleshooting large-scale distributed systems.
What We Offer
A dynamic and challenging work environment in a leading global e-commerce company.
The opportunity to work with a diverse international team and to make a significant impact on JD.com's global presence.
Competitive salary and benefits package, including health insurance, retirement plans, and performance bonuses.
JD.com is committed to creating a diverse environment and is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status.
【
About JD.com】
JD.com (NASDAQ: JD and HKEX: 9618), also known as JINGDONG, is a leading supply chain-based technology and service provider. The company’s cutting-edge retail infrastructure seeks to enable consumers to buy whatever they want, whenever and wherever they want it. The company has opened its technology and infrastructure to partners, brands and other sectors, as part of its "Retail as a Service" offering to help drive productivity and innovation across a range of industries. JD.com’s business has expanded across retail, technology, logistics, health, industrials, property development and international business. JD.com is ranked 44th on the Fortune Global 500 list and is China’s largest retailer by revenue, serving over 600 million annual active customers. The company has been listed on NASDAQ since 2014, and on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange since 2020. Committed to the principles of customer first, innovation, dedication, ownership, gratitude, and integrity, the company's mission is to make lives better through technology, striving to be the most trusted company in the world.
【Our Global Business】
We are dedicated to building a digitally intelligent, cross-border supply chain and global retail infrastructure. Leveraging our global supply chain capabilities, JD.com continues to expand in markets where our competitive strengths shine. Currently, JD.com's operations span China, the U.K., the Netherlands, France, Germany, Spain, Brazil, Hungary, Japan, South Korea, Australia, Thailand, Vietnam, Malaysia, Indonesia, Saudi Arabia, the UAE, the U.S., and many others, serving customers worldwide.
Key International Business Segments: Joybuy (online retail business in Europe), International Logistics, Cross-border Import Business, JD Industrials International, JD Property International

Advanced knowledge in one or more programming languages, Javascript/Typescript, HTML/CSS, React.js, Node.js.
Familiarity with Server-side technologies: Java, Kotlin with a solid understanding of API design in GraphQL/RESTful services.
Familiarity with cloud architecture and platforms like AWS.
Experience with CI/CD pipelines and tools like Jenkins, Spinnaker, or GitHub Actions.
Excellent communication skills in English.
Preferred Qualifications
eCommerce or retail industry experience.
2+ years of experience designing, analyzing, and troubleshooting large-scale distributed systems.
What We Offer
A dynamic and challenging work environment in a leading global e-commerce company.
The opportunity to work with a diverse international team and to make a significant impact on JD.com's global presence.
Competitive salary and benefits package, including health insurance, retirement plans, and performance bonuses.
JD.com is committed to creating a diverse environment and is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status.
【
About JD.com】
JD.com (NASDAQ: JD and HKEX: 9618), also known as JINGDONG, is a leading supply chain-based technology and service provider. The company’s cutting-edge retail infrastructure seeks to enable consumers to buy whatever they want, whenever and wherever they want it. The company has opened its technology and infrastructure to partners, brands and other sectors, as part of its "Retail as a Service" offering to help drive productivity and innovation across a range of industries. JD.com’s business has expanded across retail, technology, logistics, health, industrials, property development and international business. JD.com is ranked 44th on the Fortune Global 500 list and is China’s largest retailer by revenue, serving over 600 million annual active customers. The company has been listed on NASDAQ since 2014, and on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange since 2020. Committed to the principles of customer first, innovation, dedication, ownership, gratitude, and integrity, the company's mission is to make lives better through technology, striving to be the most trusted company in the world.
【Our Global Business】
We are dedicated to building a digitally intelligent, cross-border supply chain and global retail infrastructure. Leveraging our global supply chain capabilities, JD.com continues to expand in markets where our competitive strengths shine. Currently, JD.com's operations span China, the U.K., the Netherlands, France, Germany, Spain, Brazil, Hungary, Japan, South Korea, Australia, Thailand, Vietnam, Malaysia, Indonesia, Saudi Arabia, the UAE, the U.S., and many others, serving customers worldwide.
Key International Business Segments: Joybuy (online retail business in Europe), International Logistics, Cross-border Import Business, JD Industrials International, JD Property International

company_description:
About Evondos Group
Evondos Group is the European market leader in medication management, with over 450 employees working in the Nordics and the Netherlands. Evondos service enables thousands of people who require medication to receive support in proper medication use through our automatic medication dispenser. This improves and enhances patient safety and medication adherence. Evondos helps clients live independently in their own homes, reducing the pressure on home care services, allowing them to focus on more complex care needs.
This is the role - What you will do:
We are looking for two talented Developers to join our Cloud Team in the Netherlands - one Senior and one Medior - to help us build and enhance our cloud solutions. You will become part of the Cloud team responsible for the Cloud platform. This Cloud team is the heart of our organization and is responsible for our operational management, handling tens of thousands of medication dispensations per day. The Cloud team operates according to Agile principles and consists of 7 developers with whom you will closely collaborate. Within the team, there is plenty of room for your own input and creativity.
These Are The Responsibilities
You will work in the scrum development team, with whom you will have daily contact. The tasks will be divided between software development and operational duties. Software development focuses on optimizing the processes surrounding medication dispensation from the Medido dispensers.
You will make a significant contribution to this optimization by designing and developing solutions.
The Cloud you will be working on consists of various microservices based on Symfony.
Depending on where they are deployed worldwide, the components may differ (for example, due to GDPR compliance).
Within Medido, virtual machines with Linux are still used. Additionally, a large portion already operates in Kubernetes.
In the near future, we aim to further migrate this to the public cloud. As an experienced developer with DevOps capabilities, you will naturally make a strong contribution to this.
Why you will want to join us:
🤝 A culture that encourages experimentation, learning, and personal growth. Gain exposure to cutting-edge technologies.
🚀Possibility for 32 - 40 hours per week. Work hybrid (office and remote), with the requirement of working at the office 2 days per week.
🎯Make a real and lasting impact on the organization's success. Ample opportunities for advancement in various directions within our organization.
This could be you:
You have extensive experience with PHP in general and with Symfony framework in specific;
You have knowledge and experience with MariaDB and RabbitMQ;
You have knowledge and experience with Linux, Docker and Kubernetes;
You are familiar with continuous integration and continuous deployment;
You work according to Clean Code principles; You are a true team player and easily take on a coaching role towards developers with less experience;
You are pro-active and initiative person. You own your work and help others by your example.
What we offer:
🚀The space to take initiative and seize opportunities.
🤝Our positive work environment is built on key elements such as equality, friendliness, and team spirit.
🌟 At Evondos we are passionate about developing a desired workplace where people can grow with the company and do their work with pride and joy, encouraged by our meaningful mission of enabling an independent life at home.
🪙 Enjoy a benefit, pension and a salary package tailored to your experience and skills. Final details will be discussed together during the hiring process.
🛠️We provide all the tools you need both at the office and for your home-office.
Ready to join a growing company and make a real impact?
For this position, you will join the R&D team at our office in Zoetermeer and once in a while Zwolle. As part of a team of 7, you will work dedicatedly to provide the best experience for our customers. You will work in a pleasant environment where you feel right at home. Working with us is more than a job. It's a calling to collaborate on improving the living conditions of clients and the working conditions of healthcare providers. We work as a team on innovative solutions in healthcare. Have we sparked your interest?
Apply now!
Do you recognize yourself in this profile? Apply now and join our passionate team at Evondos!
💜
Together we are strong!
💜
As a fair employer, we are committed to selecting the best candidates for the role. Please note that only applicants who are eligible to work in the country of work location (Netherlands specifically) and hold valid EU work authorisation will be considered for this position. Please note that we cannot offer visa sponsorship for this role.
Recruitment Agencies: We are confident in finding the right candidate through our own network. Should we need recruitment assistance, we will work with the agencies we already do collaborate with.
